case_title: LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC VS. JOSEPH BRADEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JONATHAN SEIGEL RE: DEFT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ORDER COMPELLING INSPECTION OF PREMISES FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADEN, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 81 NINTH STREET, APT. #606, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,260.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,260.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2005 Continued To Apr-04-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on From Dept. 206for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Irene Burns.
Jonathan Seigel, Esq., for Plaintiff: Lem/Ray Properties, LLC. Jacqueline Smith, property accountant and Gustavo Alvarez present, were sworn and examined.
No appearance by the defendant.
Exhibit 1---Lease agreement dtd 1/17/04----ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three day notice dtd.2/22/05 ---ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Joseph Braden as follows:
Restitution and possession of property located at 81 Ninth Street, Apt. #606, San Francisco, CA
Principal $2,260.00
Costs per cost bill
Judgment signed in open court. Exhibits withdrawn and returned to counsel.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

Additional Hearing To Determine Whether Evidentiary And/Or Issue Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-01-2005 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Inspection Of Premises; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2005 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances-Jonathan Seigel attorney for Plaintiff Lem/Ray Properties; Defendant in pro per, Joseph Braden, not present.

Commissioner--Sue Kaplan, Clerk-Param Natt, Not reported (218)

Settlement conference held. No appearance by defendant. Jury demand stricken and case contiued to Court trial 4/4/05.
